news.content_html: Use pip install pyiqa to try our PyTorch toolbox for Image Quality Assessment IQA-PyTorch
Find a comprehensive survey about Image Quality Assessment here: Awesome-Image-Quality-Assessment
One paper is accepted by ICCV2025 (Highlight)!
Our work Text4Seg is accepted by ICLR2025!
Four papers are accepted by ACM MM2024 with three Oral (3.97%) presentations!
Five papers are accepted by ECCV2024 (1 first-authored, 1 Oral)!
Q-Align is accepted by ICML2024!
Two papers (Co-authored) about IQA are accepted by CVPR2024!
Q-Bench is accepted as spotlight paper (4.96%) by ICLR2024!
TOPIQ is accepted by Transactions on Image Processing (TIP).
One paper about image super-resolution is accepted by AAAI2024.
We release Q-Instruct, a multi-modality dataset for low-level visual instruction tuning with large visual language models.
We release Q-Bench, a systematic benchmark for multi-modality LLMs (MLLMs) on low-level vision and visual quality assessment.
Extension of FAST-VQA (FasterVQA) get accepted by TPAMI.
One paper about video quality assessment is accepted by ACM MM 2023.
One paper about video quality assessment is accepted by ICCV 2023.
One paper about video quality assessment is accepted by ICME 2023.
One paper about video quality assessment is accepted by TCSVT 2023.
One paper about video prediction is accepted by AAAI 2023.
Our research team, NTU Visual Quality Assessment Group is created, which aims to build efficient and explainable Visual Quality Assessment approaches.
One paper is accepted by NeurIPS 2022.
Three papers have been accepted by ECCV2022.
Two papers, including QuanTexSR (renamed as FeMaSR) have been accepted by ACM MM2022 as Oral presentation (5.9%).
One paper, FFRNet about masked face recognition has been accepted by ICIP2022.
We release our work about blind image resolution, QuanTexSR, together with the codes in Github.
We release a PyTorch toolbox for IQA as well as a comprehensive survey .
One paper about HDR video reconstruction is accepted by ICCV 2021.
Our paper PSFR-GAN about face SR has been accepted by CVPR2021.
Our paper SPARNet about face SR has been accepted by TIP2020.
